title: Planned power outage: Parkdene
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for Tuesday 9 April from 08:00 to 20:00 for alterations to the electrical mains.

The following areas will be affected:

- Hercules Street
- Circular Avenue
- Ballot Street
- Apollo Street
- Parish Street
- Venus Lane Street
- Jupiter Lane
- Rotary Street
- Portion Of Kloof
- Fiskaal Street

Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.

Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period; the work will be done on Thursday 11 April from 08:00 to 20:00.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
